description: Android-only plugin permissions (barcode-scanner/biometric/haily-voice) — split from `default.json` and scoped via `platforms` because those plugin CRATES are themselves Android/iOS-target-gated dependencies (Cargo.toml). Referencing their permission identifiers from a capability that applies to every platform breaks a host `cargo check`/`cargo test` build, which never compiles those crates and so has no registered schema for their permission names.
